scenes.scene_narration: The explosion ripped through the building. Debris flew in every direction as I sprinted toward the exit. Time was running out, seconds ticking away like a countdown to oblivion.
scenes.scene_narration_plain: The explosion ripped through the building. Debris flew in every direction as I sprinted toward the exit. Time was running out, seconds ticking away like a countdown to oblivion.
scenes.scene_narration_ssml: <speak><prosody rate="fast" volume="loud">The explosion ripped through the building. <break time="210ms"/> Debris flew in every direction as I sprinted toward the exit. <break time="210ms"/> Time was running out, <break time="105ms"/> seconds ticking away like a countdown to oblivion.</prosody></speak>

scenes.scene_narration: Bullets ricocheted off the metal walls, sparks flying everywhere. I dove behind cover, my heart pounding in my chest. This was survival, pure and simple.
scenes.scene_narration_plain: Bullets ricocheted off the metal walls, sparks flying everywhere. I dove behind cover, my heart pounding in my chest. This was survival, pure and simple.
